name: Stock Report Generation System
initial_requirements: I need a website that helps me search for stocks and automatically generate stock analysis reports.

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: I prefer to search for stocks by entering stock codes or stock names.
I prefer to select the report format and content scope before report generation, instead of using a default report template.
I expect the generated reports to include basic stock information, market trends, and financial data.
I prefer the website to use a white background.
I prefer the website components to use a navy color.

name: Texas Hold'em Online Poker Platform
initial_requirements: I need a web-based Texas Hold'em poker game where I can create or join game rooms from a lobby, play at tables with other players, use chat while playing, view my game records, and manage my account information.

Implicit Requirements.RequirementText: I prefer to perform all poker actions through clearly provided action buttons during gameplay.
I expect the game lobby to show detailed information about each game room, including availability, current game status, and participating players.
I expect the table game view to clearly present essential poker information, including my hand cards, community cards, and current betting information.
I prefer the overall page background to use an azure color.
I prefer the interface elements to use a midnight blue color.

As a user, I want to create game rooms, so that I can start new Texas Hold’em games for others and myself to join.

As a user, I want to view game records, so that I can review past games and outcomes.
As a user, I want to manage my account information, so that I can maintain and update my personal account details.
As a user, I want the game lobby to display available game rooms, so that I can choose which room to join or observe.
As a user, I want the game lobby to display the current game status for each room, so that I can understand what stage each game is in.
As a user, I want the game lobby to display player information for each room, so that I can see who is participating in the games.

As a user, I want the page background to use an azure color, so that the overall background appearance matches the specified style.
As a user, I want the elements in the interface to use a midnight blue color, so that the interface elements match the specified style.

name: customer service call logging system
